candel
  • API Reference
  • candel.redshift2real
  • View page source

candel.redshift2real

Module for mapping observed redshift to cosmological redshift given some calibrated density and velocity field.

candel.redshift2real.model.log_mean_exp_np(logp, axis=-1)[source]

NumPy version of log_mean_exp.

candel.redshift2real.model.ln_simpson_np(ln_y, x, axis=-1)[source]

Numerically stable log-Simpson integration using scipy.

Computes log(integral(exp(ln_y), x)) by shifting to avoid overflow.

candel.redshift2real.model.normal_logpdf_np(x, loc, scale)[source]

NumPy implementation of Normal log-pdf.

candel.redshift2real.model.smoothclip_nr_np(nr, tau)[source]

Smooth zero-clipping for the number density (NumPy version).

candel.redshift2real.model.lp_galaxy_bias_np(delta, log_rho, bias_params, galaxy_bias)[source]

NumPy version of lp_galaxy_bias.

class candel.redshift2real.model.BaseRedshift2Real(RA, dec, zcmb, los_r, los_density, los_velocity, which_bias, calibration_samples, Rmin=1e-07, Rmax=500, num_rgrid=101, r0_decay_scale=5, Om0=0.3, verbose=True, r_init=None)[source]

Bases: ABC

Base class for all models.

print_sample_stats()[source]
class candel.redshift2real.model.Redshift2Real(RA, dec, zcmb, los_r, los_density, los_velocity, which_bias, calibration_samples, Rmin=1e-07, Rmax=500, num_rgrid=101, r0_decay_scale=5, Om0=0.3, verbose=True, r_init=None)[source]

Bases: BaseRedshift2Real

Numerical evaluation of the posterior p(z_cosmo | z_obs, calibration).

Instead of MCMC sampling, this class evaluates the log-posterior on a grid of z_cosmo values and normalizes numerically using Simpson integration. Core computation is JIT-compiled with JAX.

static posterior_summary(z_grid, log_posterior, ci=0.68)[source]

Compute summary statistics from the posterior.

Parameters:

  • z_grid (array, shape (nz,))

  • log_posterior (array, shape (ngal, nz))

  • ci (float) – Credible interval (default 0.68 for 1-sigma).

Returns:

  • ‘mean’: posterior mean

  • ’median’: posterior median

  • ’std’: posterior standard deviation

  • ’map’: maximum a posteriori estimate

  • ’ci_low’, ‘ci_high’: credible interval bounds

Return type:

dict with keys
